title: Escape of Shark
subTitle: After a tsunami suddenly attacks, a beach party turns into a nightmare as the hotel is submerged in the sea. All the partygoers must find a way to survive when a giant shark starts hunting them.

subTitle: As the ocean currents change, a deadly cold-blooded killer enters the environment. Disruption ensues when an expert is invited to investigate the situation.

subTitle: Parker joins a crew of trophy hunters tasked with shooting down genetically recreated dinosaurs. However, things take a turn when their guide gets killed by a raptor. Will the group survive?

title: Coma
subTitle: A young architect awakens in a bizarre world after an eerie accident. To survive, he must uncover the rules of this world while searching for a way back home.

title: White Haired Princess
subTitle: An ambitious eunuch takes undue advantage of the Emperor's illness to seize control over the Ming dynasty. However, an unforeseen rebellion erupts after the king recovers from his illness.

title: Orphan: First Kill
subTitle: After escaping from a psychiatric facility, Esther travels to the USA by impersonating a girl from a rich family. However, the mother of the family vows to protect her own from the impersonator.

title: The Girl Next Door
subTitle: A teenage boy's dreams come true when an attractive girl moves into the house next door. They fall in love, but then he discovers she is a former adult film star.

title: Jurassic Hunt
subTitle: Parker joins a crew of trophy hunters tasked with shooting down genetically recreated dinosaurs. However, things take a turn when their guide gets killed by a raptor. Will the group survive?

title: Higher Power
subTitle: A mad scientist scours the DNA of everyone on Earth to find someone capable of saving the planet. Soon, he kidnaps Joe, a former alcoholic, and his experiments impart a strange power to Joe.

title: Acts of Violence
subTitle: Roman MacGregor embarks on a mission to save his missing fiancee with the help of his ex-military brothers and an honest police officer.

title: Maneater
subTitle: Jessie goes on a vacation with her friends after her wedding is cancelled. Soon, their holiday turns into a nightmare when they are relentlessly attacked by a shark.

title: Born to Fly
subTitle: When foreign technology poses a threat to Chinese airspace, a group of young pilots joins a training program. The rigorous process tests their skills under pressure.

title: The Marsh King's Daughter
subTitle: Helena is haunted by memories of her estranged father Jacob, who held her and her mother captive for years. However, when he escapes prison, she becomes paranoid as she prepares for his arrival.

title: You Were Never Really Here
subTitle: An army veteran scours a brothel on a tense mission to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a New York State senator. However, things soon take a dark turn when he discovers a corrupt conspiracy.

subTitle: During the quest for a lost treasure, things take a dangerous turn as a group of deep-sea divers accidentally awaken an aquatic dinosaur.

subTitle: After a dramatic twist of fate, high school English teacher Lance Clayton gets a second chance to fulfil his dream of becoming a famous writer.

title: Mega Crocodile
subTitle: A researcher is commissioned to search for a missing person on the Hell Island full of crocodiles but soon find themselves endangered when giant crocodiles begin threatening their lives.

title: Unfaithful
subTitle: When a suburban wife meets a Manhattan book dealer and begins an affair, her husband begins to suspect something and hires a detective. Soon learning the truth, the husband takes matters into his own hands and decides to confront his wife's lover.

title: Nowhere to Hide
subTitle: Tara fears she is losing her mind like her mother did, as unsettling events make her worry she is heading down the same path of mental illness.

title: The Mauritanian
subTitle: A wrongfully detained man, Mohamedou Ould, fights for freedom as his lawyer uncovers shocking truths, exposing injustice inside a secretive prison system.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

title: Sicario: Day of the Soldado
subTitle: CIA agent, Matt Greer, and his team embark on a mission to contain drug cartels, responsible for smuggling of terrorists across the border.

title: Gunpowder Milkshake
subTitle: Three generations of hitwomen fight for survival against a criminal firm and try to protect what is most important to them.

title: Nefarious
subTitle: Edward, a convicted serial killer, is scheduled to be interviewed by Dr James Martin, a psychiatrist. Things take a turn when Edward makes an ominous prediction during the conversation.

subTitle: An enchanted fish is encouraged by Han Xiang Zi to leap over the governor's palace into the parched land. Han Xiang Zi later realises there is much more to the magical fish than meets the eye.

title: Corner Office
subTitle: Orson is an office employee who believes his strict work ethic will help him ascend the corporate ladder. One day, he discovers an elegantly decorated room that his colleagues believe does not exist.

title: The Iron Claw
subTitle: The Von Erich siblings battle adversity and their father's imposing legacy as they climb the ranks of the professional wrestling world.

title: Spread
subTitle: Nikki, a homeless man, charms rich women for gain and dates Samantha. However, he secretly starts an affair with Heather, a waitress, and Samantha uncovers his lies and true nature.

subTitle: Mona Lisa, a woman with psychokinetic powers, escapes from a mental asylum and travels to New Orleans. Once there, she meets Bonnie who decides to make use of her powers to earn money.
